description: Configure the Chrome browser for a financial forensics investigation according to the standard. Organize investigative bookmarks into specific folders, delete all personal bookmarks to maintain OpSec, configure custom search engines for entity lookups, and harden privacy settings.
instruction: A configuration standard is located at ~/Desktop/Investigation_OpSec_Standard.txt. You must implement all of its requirements: 1. Categorize OSINT bookmarks into four folders: 'Sanctions & Watchlists', 'Corporate Registries', 'Intelligence Databases', and 'Asset Tracking'. 2. Delete all 7 personal/entertainment bookmarks from the browser entirely. 3. Add 3 custom search engines: 'oc' for OpenCorporates, 'icij' for Offshore Leaks, and 'ofac' for OFAC Sanctions. 4. Block third-party cookies, enable Do Not Track, and set Safe Browsing to Enhanced Protection. 5. Set download path to ~/Documents/Case_GoldenFleece/Evidence and enable prompt. 6. Set startup pages to ICIJ Offshore Leaks and OpenCorporates.
